name: free-ride
tagline: ClawHub (474★): Manages free AI models from OpenRouter for OpenClaw. Automatically ranks models by quality, configures fallbacks for rate-l
verdict: Its frontmatter name doesn't even match its own directory, a basic mismatch. It also gives no guidance on when not to use it despite broad triggers like 'reduce AI costs' that could catch unrelated cost-saving requests, and carries no version history. Quality itself scores well otherwise.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere in the file, despite broad triggers ('model switching', 'reduce AI costs') that could misfire on non-OpenRouter or non-OpenClaw cost/mode
Skill directory is free-ride but frontmatter name is freeride (no hyphen) — mismatch per H02 rule.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
